class.help: Mantiene las distintas Jerarquía del sistema.
class.label: Jerarquía
class.name: JERARQUIA

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_jerarquia as oi_jerarquia, t0.c_jerarquia as c_jerarquia, t0.d_jerarquia as d_jerarquia, t0.l_profesional as l_profesional, SEC.policy, t0.c_jerarquia as CODE, t0.d_jerarquia as TEXT FROM SDP07_JERARQUIA as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.Jerarquias.JERARQUIA\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_jerarquia LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_jerarquia asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_jerarquia as oi_jerarquia, SEC.policy FROM SDP07_JERARQUIA as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.Jerarquias.JERARQUIA\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_jerarquia LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_jerarquia asc')/ROWS/ROW

attribute.description: Código de AFJP. Puede ser alfanumérico de hasta 30 caracteres.
attribute.label: Código
attribute.name: c_jerarquia

attribute.description: Descripción de AFJP. Puede ser alfanumérico de hasta 100 caracteres.
attribute.label: Descripción
attribute.name: d_jerarquia

key.msg: Ya existe una Jerarquía con el código ingresado.
key.name: AK_KEY_2_SDP07_JE

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.Jerarquias.JERARQUIA.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.Jerarquias.JERARQUIA.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SDP07_JERARQUIA.oi_jerarquia) as CNT from SDP07_JERARQUIA Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SDP07_JERARQUIA.oi_jerarquia={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SDP07_JERARQUIA.d_jerarquia,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SDP07_JERARQUIA.c_jerarquia,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT SDP07_JERARQUIA.oi_jerarquia, SDP07_JERARQUIA.c_jerarquia, SDP07_JERARQUIA.d_jerarquia FROM SDP07_JERARQUIA ')ROWS/ROW
